verdict_detail: Frozen 96^3 3-warmup/5-sample/4-round qualification aborted at the numerical gate that the harness asserts before the timing loop. The physical power closure |P_accepted - P_rad| / P_incident is 0.028646 (2.865%), exceeding the 1% frozen gate. The recorded Phase 1 value on commit 3223e0c was 6.997e-4 (0.07%). All other numerical gates pass with wide margin and the timing contract was not reached, so no basis/direct timing ratio was measured.

protocol.note: Timing loop not executed; numerical gate failed first, by design.

host.re_anchor_reason: The frozen performance contract host is being re-anchored from the RTX 5080 to this 2x A6000 host per the plan re-qualification host rule. Qualification could not complete because the numerical gate failed before timing.
